title: conyza decurrens
intro: Conyza decurrens, also known as fuzzy flea bane or hairy fleabane, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, cuts, and skin infections. The health benefits of Conyza decurrens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. Conyza decurrens is often prepared as a tea or infused oil, and it can also be used in herbal remedies such as tinctures and salves.
